diagnostic.label: Urban-to-rural classification (USDA RUCA)
diagnostic.description: USDA Rural-Urban Commuting Area code from 1 to 10; higher values mean more rural.

diagnostic.label: Housing units
diagnostic.description: Total housing units in the tract.

diagnostic.label: Persistent-poverty county
diagnostic.description: 1 if the tract is in a USDA-designated persistent-poverty county, defined by long-running poverty of at least 20 percent.

diagnostic.label: Population
diagnostic.description: Total population in the tract from ACS 5-year estimates.

diagnostic.label: Median household income
diagnostic.description: Median household income in the tract from ACS 5-year estimates.

diagnostic.label: Pct Black
diagnostic.description: Share of tract population identifying as Black or African-American.

diagnostic.label: FDIC deposit HHI, 3-year change
diagnostic.description: Three-year change in county bank-deposit concentration using the FDIC Summary of Deposits.

diagnostic.label: Pct minority
diagnostic.description: Share of tract population identifying as a racial or ethnic minority.

diagnostic.label: Rural area
diagnostic.description: 1 if the tract is rural by USDA RUCA classification; 0 otherwise.

diagnostic.label: FDIC deposit HHI
diagnostic.description: County-level Herfindahl-Hirschman Index for bank deposits, where higher values mean deposits are concentrated in fewer banks.

diagnostic.label: Top bank deposit share, 3-year change
diagnostic.description: Three-year change in the largest bank's share of county deposits.

diagnostic.label: County CRA loan-amount HHI
diagnostic.description: County-level concentration of CRA small-business loan dollars across lenders.

diagnostic.label: Poverty rate
diagnostic.description: Share of tract population below the federal poverty line.

diagnostic.label: HMDA available
diagnostic.description: 1 if HMDA mortgage data is available for the tract-year; mainly marks post-2018 observations in this pipeline.

diagnostic.label: Pct vacant housing
diagnostic.description: Share of tract housing units that are vacant.

diagnostic.label: County top CRA lender share by count
diagnostic.description: Largest lender's share of county CRA small-business loans by loan count.

diagnostic.label: Pct Hispanic
diagnostic.description: Share of tract population identifying as Hispanic or Latino.

diagnostic.label: Total HMDA loan amount
diagnostic.description: Total dollar amount of HMDA mortgage originations in the tract-year.

diagnostic.label: County CRA loan-count HHI
diagnostic.description: County-level concentration of CRA small-business loan counts across lenders.

diagnostic.label: Mean HMDA loan amount
diagnostic.description: Average HMDA mortgage loan amount in the tract-year.

diagnostic.label: FDIC top bank share
diagnostic.description: Largest bank's share of county deposits.

diagnostic.label: County top CRA lender share by amount
diagnostic.description: Largest lender's share of county CRA small-business loan dollars.

diagnostic.label: White HMDA applicants
diagnostic.description: Count of HMDA applicants identifying as White in the tract-year.

diagnostic.label: FDIC deposit HHI, 1-year change
diagnostic.description: One-year change in county bank-deposit concentration.

diagnostic.label: Top bank deposit share, 1-year change
diagnostic.description: One-year change in the largest bank's share of county deposits.

diagnostic.label: Pct bachelor's plus
diagnostic.description: Share of adults with a bachelor's degree or higher.

diagnostic.label: HMDA mortgage originations
diagnostic.description: Count of HMDA mortgage applications that were originated in the tract-year.

diagnostic.label: Unemployment rate
diagnostic.description: Share of the labor force that is unemployed.

diagnostic.label: HMDA applications withdrawn
diagnostic.description: Count of HMDA mortgage applications withdrawn by the applicant.

diagnostic.label: Distinct HMDA lenders
diagnostic.description: Count of distinct HMDA-reporting mortgage lenders active in the tract-year.

diagnostic.label: HMDA mortgage denials
diagnostic.description: Count of HMDA mortgage applications denied in the tract-year.

diagnostic.label: HMDA approval rate
diagnostic.description: Share of decided HMDA mortgage applications that were approved.

diagnostic.label: HMDA mortgage applications
diagnostic.description: Count of HMDA mortgage applications in the tract-year.

diagnostic.label: HMDA denial rate
diagnostic.description: Share of decided HMDA mortgage applications that were denied.

diagnostic.label: Hispanic HMDA applicants
diagnostic.description: Count of HMDA applicants identifying as Hispanic in the tract-year.

diagnostic.label: Other or unreported-race HMDA applicants
diagnostic.description: Count of HMDA applicants with other or unreported race categories.

diagnostic.label: Black HMDA applicants
diagnostic.description: Count of HMDA applicants identifying as Black in the tract-year.

diagnostic.label: HMDA loans purchased
diagnostic.description: Count of HMDA mortgage loans purchased by reporting institutions.

diagnostic.label: Asian HMDA applicants
diagnostic.description: Count of HMDA applicants identifying as Asian in the tract-year.

influenceable.label: % loans from community banks (residualized)
influenceable.description: Share of CRA small-business loans from community banks after residualizing against demographics and market context.

influenceable.label: % loans from top-4 banks (residualized)
influenceable.description: Share of CRA small-business loans from the four largest national banks after residualization.

influenceable.label: % loans from credit unions (residualized)
influenceable.description: Share of CRA small-business loans from credit unions after residualization.

influenceable.label: % loans under $100k (residualized)
influenceable.description: Share of CRA small-business loans below $100,000 after residualization.

influenceable.label: % loans under $250k (residualized)
influenceable.description: Share of CRA small-business loans below $250,000 after residualization.

influenceable.label: Top-1 lender share (residualized)
influenceable.description: Single largest CRA lender's tract-level loan share after residualization.

influenceable.label: Top-3 lender share (residualized)
influenceable.description: Combined loan share of the three largest CRA lenders in the tract after residualization.

influenceable.label: Lender HHI (residualized)
influenceable.description: Tract-level CRA lender concentration after residualization; higher values mean a more concentrated lender market.

influenceable.label: Distance to nearest bank branch (mi)
influenceable.description: Straight-line distance from the tract centroid to the closest FDIC-insured bank branch, in miles.

influenceable.label: Bank branches within 5mi
influenceable.description: Count of FDIC-insured bank branches within 5 miles of the tract centroid.

influenceable.label: Branch closures, 3y within 10mi
influenceable.description: Count of bank branches within 10 miles that disappeared in the prior 3 years.

influenceable.label: Microlender intermediaries within 25mi
influenceable.description: Count of SBA-designated microlender intermediaries within 25 miles.

influenceable.label: MDI branches within 10mi
influenceable.description: Count of Minority Depository Institution branches within 10 miles.

influenceable.label: MDI branches within 25mi
influenceable.description: Count of Minority Depository Institution branches within 25 miles.

influenceable.label: Nearest MDI branch (mi)
influenceable.description: Distance from the tract centroid to the nearest Minority Depository Institution branch, in miles.

influenceable.label: MDI active in county
influenceable.description: 1 if any Minority Depository Institution branch is active in the tract's county-year; 0 otherwise.

influenceable.label: SSBCI program active
influenceable.description: 1 if a State Small Business Credit Initiative program is active in the state-year; 0 otherwise.

influenceable.label: SSBCI 2.0 active
influenceable.description: 1 if the post-2022 SSBCI 2.0 program is active in the state-year; 0 otherwise.

influenceable.label: SSBCI program count
influenceable.description: Count of distinct SSBCI program types active in the state-year.

influenceable.label: SSBCI capital programs
influenceable.description: Count of active SSBCI capital-deployment program types, excluding venture-only programs.
